action.reasoning: Observation: Predict.py FileNotFoundError was from local testing with /data (no test.csv), not from actual eval. JSON serialization was already fixed with float(). Previous eval in iter 19 processed all 50776 sequences but failed on JSON dump. Current predict.py should work in eval. Analysis: Best test Spearman is 0.7432 from pure MLP. Current model adds blending with additive predictions. Need to test this. Decision: Submit eval with current predict.py (blending approach). If score is worse than 0.7432, revert to pure MLP. Also prepare Ridge regression as alternative for better extrapolation.
